title: Transcript:Caninelle Draynar
wikitext:
{{transcript|npc}}
{{Transcript list|Caninelle Draynar|Pipistrelle Draynar}}

==Standard dialogue==
* '''Player:''' Player: Hello there.
* '''Caninelle Draynar:''' Darling, who's this?
* '''Pipistrelle Draynar:''' I don't know, darling. Why don't you ask them?
* '''Caninelle Draynar:''' Yes, good idea!
* '''Caninelle Draynar:''' Who are you?
* '''Player:''' I'm [Vampyre name].
* '''Caninelle Draynar:''' Hello, [Vampyre name]. I'm Caninelle Draynar and this is Pipistrelle Draynar.
* '''Pipistrelle Draynar:''' Hello there!
* '''Player:''' Draynar? Any connection to Draynor?
* '''Pipistrelle Draynar:''' Oh yes. The Draynar family has been around since before vampyres came to this world.
* '''Caninelle Draynar:''' Over time, some people took the name and started pronouncing it differently. Hence Draynor.
* '''Pipistrelle Draynar:''' Draynor is more commonly used as a first name though, with Draynar as a last name.
* '''Player:''' Thanks for the information. I wonder if there's a Draynor Draynar out there.
* '''Pipistrelle Draynar:''' Now that would be funny.
* '''Player:''' See you around.
* {{tact|end}}

===If the player is not disguised===
* '''Caninelle/Pipistrelle Draynar:''' Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
* {{tact|end}}
